channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-24
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen significant progress across multiple projects. Notably, the `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects, both led by MicheleNuijten and Gilad Feldman respectively, have made administrative updates and synchronized their main branches with recent changes. Meanwhile, the `oddpub` project has updated its ontogenerator's code validation process, and `docpluck` has addressed several issues, including text loss and rendering fixes. The `coarse` project has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `regcheck` has resolved multiple bugs, including issues with its demo page, card preview, and ad blocker interference. These connections between projects highlight the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress made towards improving research tools and methodologies.

22 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

tenzing9 commits
metacheck6 commits
oddpub6 commits
escicheck1 commits

item.title: tenzing: 2 commits today
item.description:
marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing

The `gh-pages` branch was updated with a commit that built the site for `tenzing@0.4.1`, as indicated by the commit message "Anka: Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: d271884". The `master` branch was updated with a change to the `sweet_alert.js` file, specifically updating the success alert title, as stated in the commit message "Alex O. Holcombe: Update success alert title in sweet_alert.js". No other branches were modified in these commits, with the changes being limited to these two specific updates on the `gh-pages` and `master` branches. The `gh-pages` branch update was performed by Anka, while the `master` branch update was performed by Alex O. Holcombe. These commits suggest a focus on both the website build and the alert functionality in the application.

2 commit(s) today:

  • ea980fd [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: d271884 — Anka
  • d271884 [master] Update success alert title in sweet_alert.js — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 72ba97c [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: e81218b — Anka
  • e81218b [master] improving wording — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 2365b27 [master] reword — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 92af8bb [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: 99b3ee2 — Anka
  • 99b3ee2 [master] Italicize testimonials for emphasis — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 0e4950f [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: 388e7e3 — Anka
  • 388e7e3 [master] Update about.Rmd with recommendations, improve writing — Alex O. Holcombe

View all commits →
